subject: english
learning_objectives: Define religious vocabulary from Christian, traditional, and Islamic contexts
Distinguish terms belonging to different faith traditions
Use selected religious terms in sentences

sections.heading: Christian Religion Terms
sections.content: Examples include theology, atheist, monotheist, ethics, worship, seer, crucifix, denomination, synagogue, baptism, christen, christendom, episcopacy, sacristy, tenet, benediction, divinity, papacy, pew, eucharist, and communion.

sections.heading: Traditional Religion and Islam
sections.content:
Traditional religion terms include deity, priest, myth, incantation, reincarnation, propitiation, cult, ritual, and libation.
Islamic terms include ablution, hajj, injunction, pilgrimage, adherent, haram, sharia, sect, monotheism, imam, malam, sheikh, and the pillars of Islam.
